items.name: adaptive-banner
items.title: Adaptive Banner
items.description: A graceful fallback UI banner for error handling and alerts.

items.name: adaptive-fatal-error
items.title: Adaptive Fatal Error
items.description: A full-screen, accessible modal for unrecoverable crashes.

items.name: adaptive-toast
items.title: Adaptive Toast
items.description: A pre-styled, recovery-ready wrapper around Sonner for error notifications.

items.name: adaptive-error-boundary
items.title: Adaptive Error Boundary
items.description: A ready-to-use Error Boundary that degrades UI gracefully using toasts, banners, or modals.
